## groupbox() function

Create a visual box for grouping one or widgets with the specified parameters by using a flexible control internally. This widget is essentially a combination between `box()` and `flexible()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function groupbox(params: BoxContainer[] & FlexiblePosition): WidgetCreator<FlexiblePosition>;
```
